author: potuz
content: According to Dora there's a ton of payloads being reorged, did we relaunch the death star?

author: terencechain
content: I think that's a Dora bug. It uses the payload availability event as a signal to retrieve payload from db  (race) instead it should use payload processed event

author: nflaig
content: we didn't deploy deathstar but those would show up as orphaned and not missed, looking at the missed payloads in epoch 3253, eg. https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/104127 it seems right what dora displays, looks like the builder connected to lighthouse is not revealing payloads

content:
yeah there are some reveal issues with the lighthouse builder, should be easily fixable:

```
time="2026-06-19T08:54:55Z" level=error msg="Failed to submit reveal" attempt=1 component=scheduler error="failed to submit envelope: failed to submit envelope: status 400: {\"code\":400,\"message\":\"BAD_REQUEST: body deserialize error: Request body deserialize error: missing field `message` at line 1 column 1575701\",\"stacktraces\":[]}" max_attempts=3 slot=106774
```
